subcodes.first_line: The remembrance of God from the Tree of Command hath in this hour called aloud, saying: O people! Follow ye that which the Beauty commandeth you [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر الله من شجره الامر قد کان حینئذ منادیا بان یا قوم اتبعوا ما یامرکم جمال
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @prayer for protection, @power of prayer, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
